description: Product Description Previous page Next page Will they slip during walks or runs? No. A silicone heel grip and elastic cuff keep them in place. (Grip is at the heel, not the sole.) Are they comfortable in hot weather? Yes. 80% cotton is soft and breathable; the flat cushioned knit adds protection without bulk. The heel strip doesnвЂ™t feel sticky. Will they stay invisible in my shoes? Yes in most low-top sneakers/trainers/loafers. In very low-cut flats, a thin edge may showвЂ”match the color. How do I choose the right size? US 5вЂ“9 (22.5 cm), 9вЂ“12 (24 cm), 12вЂ“14 (25.5 cm). With 3% spandex, they stretch; if between sizes or wider feet, size up. Are they durable and good value? Reinforced heel/toe + 17% polyester for durability; elastic cuff holds shape. Includes a 1-year free replacement.
